title: Sculk Ward Trim
description: Makes the ward armor trim have sculk like silence armor trim
body:
## Sculk Ward Trim
This resource pack makes the ward armor trim have the same sculk effect as the silence armor trim.

![Line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4740656cfa3d9109fa8053832ff99063126b76e.png)
